frontmatter.description: Authentication token observed in unexpected context (logs, client error reports, public repo)

signature.embedding_seed: token leaked credential exposure secret in logs

body:
## When this fires
A token has been observed in a context that suggests exposure: error reports including bearer tokens, logs containing secrets, or a public repo commit.

## Playbook
1. Pull audit-token-revocation to confirm the suspect token was rotated.
2. Run scan-recent-repos to find any other secrets in recent commits.
3. Notify the security on-call and document the blast radius.
